body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
In #1251 we removed the function `setup_and_run`, and added a function `step!(cs::CoupledSimulation)`. As we made this change, it looks like we added one extra step at the end of each simulation.

### Behavior before #1251
We would iterate over t in a for loop, using `t in (t_start + dt_cpl):dt_cpl:t_end`, so t was in the range `[t_start + dt_cpl, t_end]` (and so was cs.t). At each step of the loop, we set `cs.t[] = t`, then stepped component models.

### Behavior since #1251
We iterate over t in a while loop using `cs.t <= t_end`, so t is in the range `[t_start + dt_cpl, t_end]`. However, unlike before, at each step of the loop we set `cs.t[] += dt_cpl`, then stepped component models. This means that at the last step of the while loop, we set `cs.t = t_end + dt_cpl`, then step all components to that time.

### What we want
Since we want to call step!(cs) without requiring any external information, we want to keep the `cs.t[] += dt_cpl` inside the while loop. However we also want `t_end` to be the real end of the simulation. We can do this by changing the while loop to `cs.t < t_end`, which is what this PR does.
title: remove extra step at end of sim

body: Without these changes, it's not possible to run on the `clima` machine with the `climacommon/2025_05_15` module loaded. ## Old behavior
title: Update ClimaEarth environment for Julia 1.11

body:
Compat entries for Atmos / Land to support SurfaceFluxes.jl > 0.14.1 have been added to the corresponding branches. Reverts the commit pin for nightly AMIP runs to use SurfaceFluxes.jl main branch.  

Gustiness is represented as a field for consistency with other scalar fields (e.g. beta)
title: Revert SF nightly test branch to main
